name: sem13_challenge_extractor
description: Batch 14 SEM-13 eval slice for structured methodology challenge extraction.

papers.title: Detector analysis
papers.methodology: Systematic uncertainties from detector acceptance and background contamination dominate the extraction.

papers.title: Selection study
papers.methodology: Trigger selection bias is mitigated, but residual simulation mismatch remains in the control region.

papers.title: Model scan
papers.methodology: The extraction relies on a model-dependent extrapolation outside the measured phase space.

papers.title: Combined fit
papers.methodology: We perform a combined fit to multiple control channels.

papers.title: Auxiliary validation
papers.methodology: Validation samples are used to estimate residual backgrounds.

key_concerns: background subtraction depends on sideband modelling

challenge_markers: background subtraction depends on sideband modelling

papers.title: Stable pipeline
papers.methodology: A standard calibration and validated control strategy are used, and no major methodological limitation is identified.

papers.title: Ongoing study
papers.methodology: Some uncertainties are still under study and further validation is ongoing.
